## Weekly security findings

This issue is opened (or refreshed) every Monday by the `security-scheduled`
workflow. It surfaces findings that are tracked across runs but do not block
PRs (image deep scan, SBOM drift, scorecard score).

## Trivy image scan (deep)

The full output is attached as an artifact on the workflow run linked above.
Critical / High findings (with fix available) should be triaged within the
week. Lower severities can accumulate but should be reviewed monthly.

## How to close this issue

Close once all newly surfaced findings have been triaged — fixed, allowlisted
with justification (`.trivyignore`), or accepted as a tracked risk in a
follow-up issue.

A new instance of this issue is created on the next scheduled run regardless
of whether the previous one is closed.
